title.en: In a flash, tens of millions of eternal years h...

content.en:
Time flies.

In a flash, tens of millions of eternal years have passed.

Ye Tian's strength has improved a lot compared to the past, and the Will Rule Heaven and Earth and the Supreme Legendary Body have improved a lot, but there is still a distance from the peak of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm.

And during this period of time, he was also trying to create a second time supreme skill, this time the supreme skill he created was a defensive supreme skill, after all, his cultivation was too low, if he really met a top half-step legendary realm lord, he was useless just because of his strong attack power, and he couldn't kill others instantly, but the attack of the top half-step legendary realm lord could shatter his body and kill him.

Therefore, the defensive time supremacy technique is as important, once it is created, he has the ability to fight for a long time, and he is no longer afraid of any top half-step Legendary Realm Lord.

this day.

Ye Tian experimented with his Time Supreme Technique in the Void Zone, he slowly condensed a time barrier on his body, at first the time barrier collapsed, but as he tried again and again.

Finally, one day, the time barrier was finally formed.

This is not an ordinary time barrier, but a condensation of the supreme technology of time.

I saw that he condensed the dripping water of time and used it to attack his body.

Airplanes!!!

The time barrier cracked open for 150 and immediately turned into nothingness, but Ye Hao blocked the time drip.

"It's a preliminary creation, but it's not perfect, otherwise it can definitely block the time dripping without collapsing billion"

Ye Tian muttered.

Then, he experimented and perfected, and hundreds of thousands of eternal years passed.

After such a long period of rehearsal and deduction attempts, the time barrier has finally been completely perfected, and it cannot be shattered by using time dripping attacks.

At this time, this supreme skill can be regarded as truly completed.

"This time supreme skill is called the Time Barrier. "

Ye Tian took a name casually.

With the two time supreme skills of Time Dripping Water and Time Barrier, Ye Tian's strength has skyrocketed a lot, and under the Legendary Realm Lord, he can hardly be afraid of anyone.

As for the speed class time supreme skill, he doesn't need it yet, he has a wishful thinking Tissot, and he can shuttle at will, so it is enough to temporarily have two time supreme skills, time dripping water and time barrier.

this day.

Ye Tian came to the Time Trading House, and he was ready to trade some treasures that he didn't need in exchange for treasure resources that were useful to him.

As for the Terran side, he has left enough heritage, and there is no need to worry about the Terran heritage for endless years.

The immeasurable sea, the business of time.

Ye Tian came here, and immediately an employee received Ye Tian.

"I'm here to sell some items. "

Ye Tian said.

"Endless Lord, please follow me!"

The Time Firm took Ye Tian to the trading area of the Time Firm.

There are two types of transactions of Time Firm, one is auction transaction and the other is direct transaction.

Ye Tian was too lazy to wait for the auction transaction, because most of the auction transactions took a long time, and it was not too precious treasure, and Ye Tian wanted to dispose of it directly.

I saw that Ye Tian took out some eternal treasures and many resources that were too useful to him, piled them up into a small mountain, and said, "That's all." "

The employees of the Time Merchant Bank were shocked, so many treasures, this was not a transaction that an ordinary employee could handle.

So, he immediately summoned one of the presidents of the Infinite Sea Time Trading House, who was also a Legendary Realm Lord of the Infinite Sea, the Lord of Xinyang.

When the Lord of Xinyang came, he saw so many treasures that Ye Tian was going to trade, and then looked at Ye Tian's cultivation, and immediately realized that Ye Tian was a lucky person who had obtained the treasure of the Lord of the Legendary Realm.

"Endless Lord, you have to trade these treasures, don't you?"

Lord Xinyang asked.

"Yes, I dealt with it directly, without auction, what price can Time Firm give?"

Ye Tian asked.

The lord of Xinyang estimated one by one, and finally gave a price: "761.96 billion time coins." "

Ye Tian estimated that the price was reasonable, so he agreed: "Yes, then trade at this price." "

"Hahaha, Endless Lord is refreshing, I'll give you an integer too, 762 billion time coins. "

Faith lords do the main way.

Subsequently, Ye Tian completed the transaction procedures, and there was an extra 762 billion time coins on his time business bank card.

Time Coins are the currency of the Time Firm, which cannot be withdrawn, and can only be used to purchase items at the Time Firm, or to participate in auctions to bid for treasures.

This time, Ye Tian also took a fancy to a treasure of the Time Trading House, so he chose to sell so many treasure resources

"Lord of Faith, I'm going to buy a Enlightenment Void Liquid!"

Ye Hao said.

The Enlightenment Void Liquid is one of the most suitable resources for the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, and it is also included in the top ten of the most precious treasures of the Legendary Lord of the Transcendence Realm, and it is the top ten in the entire Void Region, which shows its great reputation.

Enlightenment Void Liquid can not only improve comprehension, but more importantly, it can improve the perception of heaven and earth, thereby improving the realm of will rules to a certain extent, and it can also improve the power of will, even the sixth-order will can have a small increase.

There is no Enlightenment Void Liquid in the True Saintless Land, because it is too expensive, and the price of the Time Merchant is 200 billion Time Coins.

Under normal circumstances, the entire net worth of a Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord is only tens of billions, and all the net worth is exchanged, and there is no way to buy a copy of the Enlightenment Void Liquid.

There are also some Legendary Realm lords who are willing to buy Xingfen Enlightenment Void Liquid for their own juniors to use, but they are also very few.

Ye Tian wanted to improve his cultivation quickly, because it was the most cost-effective to buy the Enlightenment Void Liquid, and besides, he was now wealthy, and only a small part of the treasures he took out were worth more than 700 billion time coins, so it was nothing to buy a copy of the Enlightenment Void Liquid.

"Yes, but the Enlightenment Void Liquid is in the headquarters, and it needs to be sent by a Legendary Realm Lord, and the Endless Lord needs to wait. Lord Xinyang said.

"Yes, I'm going to buy a Constant Sand Blood Cry as well. "

Ye Tian said again.

"Yes!" The Xinyang Lord looked overjoyed.This Hengsha Blood Cry Liquid is a treasure worth 300 billion time coins, it is of little use to the Legendary Realm Lord, and it is of the greatest help to the Legendary Body of the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, and one copy is enough for the ordinary Legendary Body to directly cultivate to the extreme.

It's a pity that the value of this thing is too high, so there are no Transcendental Legendary Lords to buy it, and there are still a few copies of the Time Merchant Bank, but they have not been able to sell them.

Now, Ye Tian bought the Enlightenment Void Liquid and the Hengsha Blood Cry Liquid all at once, which was also a huge achievement for him.

Soon, both treasures were sent by a Legendary Realm Lord. _
